variants.title: Mann Filter C 21 584 Air Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P547331
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter C 21 584 Air Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P547331
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filters for clean air intake and optimum protection for your engine, mass air flow sensor & other sensitive components / They meet requirements of modern engine technology. Highest dirt holding capacity and dirt separation efficiency, low flow resistance and high pleat stability ensure functional reliability during the entire service interval.
specifications: Style: Air Filter, Dimension A: 208.0 mm, Dimension B: 106.0 mm, Dimension C: 106.0 mm, Dimension H: 385.0 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 99.9%, Outer Diameter: 207.8 mm, Inner Diameter: 105.9 mm, Length: 383.3 mm, Media Type: Cellulose

variants.title: Donaldson P547331 Air Primary Radialseal
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P547331 Air Primary Radialseal is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.
specifications: Style: Air Primary Radialseal, Media: Cellulose, Efficiency 1: 99.9%, Outer Diameter: 207.8 mm, Inner Diameter: 105.9 mm, Length: 383.3 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 99.9%, Media Type: Cellulose

variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF25617 Magnum RS™ radial seal primary air element is designed to meet the rugged demands of equipment operating in the harshest environments.
